name: HelloFresh SE
one_liner: World's leading meal-kit provider, delivering pre-portioned ingredients and step-by-step recipes direct to consumers across 19+ countries.

ambiguities: Headcount figure of 17,459 is from stockanalysis.com (sourced from annual report filings); investing.com cites 14,453 — figures diverge likely due to different reporting dates or scope (full-time vs. total workforce including warehouse staff).
Pre-IPO total funding raised ($88M) reflects VC rounds only (last round Dec 2016); the company has been public since Nov 2017 on Frankfurt Stock Exchange.
Tech stack is inferred from AWS re:Invent 2024 session references and engineering blog signals; no official comprehensive tech-stack disclosure found.
Revenue figures are in EUR; FY2025 revenue ~€6.76B (~$7.3B USD at approximate rates), FY2024 ~€7.66B.
